questions.question: Design a simple Half Adder circuit using structural Verilog HDL. Identify the modules and their connections. Show the output of the circuit for both inputs (0,0) and (1,1).
questions.hint: Use the following Verilog modules: AND, XOR, OR

questions.question: Design a 2-to-1 Mux circuit using structural Verilog HDL. Identify the control inputs and the selected output. Show the truth table for the circuit and verify its functionality.
questions.hint: Use the following Verilog modules: AND, OR, NOT

questions.question: Design a simple Full Adder circuit using structural Verilog HDL. Identify the carry input and the output bits. Show the output of the circuit for all possible inputs. Compare it with the expected results.
questions.hint: Use the following Verilog modules: AND, XOR, OR, NOT
